description:
Operational follow-up to the F1-F4 security fixes (T-042..T-045), committed on branch security-fixes-claude-scan-2026-07-24 but NOT yet deployed. Production still runs the vulnerable code until this ticket is done.

## Deploy
- Merge the branch and deploy: `ssh thunderborn-home "/opt/vigilant/scripts/deploy.sh"` (rebuilds the image — code/template/JS changes require a rebuild, not just restart).
- deploy.sh now self-heals `.env` perms; confirm the run logs no chmod error.

## Set config (F2)
- Set `ADMIN_CHARACTER_ID=<owner char id>` in /opt/vigilant/.env before/at deploy. Prod already has an admin so the new branch is a no-op today, but set it so a future rebuild/DB reset stays safe. Do NOT leave an empty `ADMIN_CHARACTER_ID=` (pydantic rejects "" for int|None -> startup crash).

## Verify in prod (browser)
- F1: as a role-holding char, load a corp page (wallet/assets); then as a role-less same-corp account, confirm no cached corp data is served.
- F4: log in, accrue notifications, log out, confirm localStorage `vigilant_notif_*` is cleared (and that the notifications.js?v=6 asset is served).
- F3: `ssh thunderborn-home "stat -c %a /opt/vigilant/.env"` shows 600.

## One-time cleanup (F1)
- Evict pre-patch poisoned cache rows: `DELETE FROM esi_cache WHERE key LIKE '%/corporations/%'` (unreachable post-patch, but matters if rollback.sh reverts to the old image).

## Sec-toolkit sync
- `~/sec-toolkit/bin/sec_findings.py mark-attempted vigilant-vps <id> --branch security-fixes-claude-scan-2026-07-24 --commit <sha> --note "..."` for each finding (F2 = VVP-2026-013).
- Refresh: `~/sec-toolkit/bin/sec_findings.py open-md vigilant-vps > SECURITY_TODO.md`.
title: Deploy & verify security fixes F1-F4 in production
